task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the vicinity of Rifugio Lagazuoi in a mapping application (e.g., Google Earth Pro).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Map view showing the Dolomites region, specifically mountainous terrain near coordinates 46.5289, 12.0078, or 'Rifugio Lagazuoi' in the search bar.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a specific folder to organize the landing zones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Places' or 'Layers' sidebar shows a user-created folder named 'Emergency LZ Assessment'.

task_completion.description: Agent identifies and marks at least 3 potential landing zones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Map view or sidebar list shows at least 3 distinct placemarks/pins created by the user in the target area.

task_completion.description: Placemarks follow a systematic naming convention.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Placemark labels on the map or in the sidebar use names like 'LZ-Alpha', 'LZ-1', 'LZ-A', etc., rather than default names like 'Untitled Placemark'.

task_completion.description: Agent documents elevation, dimensions, and terrain notes for the landing zones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An open 'Properties', 'Get Info', or description window for a placemark containing text details about elevation, estimated dimensions (e.g., '30x30m'), and terrain notes.

task_completion.description: Agent exports the data to the specified KML file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Export' dialog box is visible showing the filename 'emergency_lz_assessment.kml' and the destination directory 'Documents'.

integrity.description: Agent uses the mapping software GUI to identify locations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the interface of a mapping application (like Google Earth) with map rendering, not a code editor or terminal window being used to generate coordinates blindly.

integrity.description: Agent visually assesses or measures the terrain.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots may show the use of a 'Ruler' tool to measure dimensions or the agent zooming in to inspect ground flatness, rather than instantly placing points.

integrity.description: Agent generates original data based on the map.
integrity.visual_evidence: The description text in placemarks appears typed or entered into the application fields, not pasted as a bulk block of JSON/text into a file editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Rifugio Lagazuoi is located in the Dolomites, Italy at approximately 46.5277, 12.0081. The terrain is mountainous. The agent must identify flat areas suitable for helicopter landings within 5km of this point.
